title: Looking to hire a freelance expert to set up projects and workflows on Monday.com
excerpt:
Hi Everyone! 
My organization has recently signed up with Monday.com for our team to manage projects and timelines more efficiently; and I need to migrate all my projects within the next few days. I am relatively new to …

posts.author: priyar (Priya Ragoowansi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone!

My organization has recently signed up with Monday.com for our team to manage projects and timelines more efficiently; and I need to migrate all my projects within the next few days. I am relatively new to the platform and would like to hire a freelance/expert to help me setup the projects and dashboards, workflows and KPIs etc. Somebody who has worked in the Retail and tourism / destination marketing industry would be great.

If you’re available to help, please connect with me!

Regards
Priya.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @priyar

We’re available to assist - Please email our team to arrange for a free consultation to understand how we can help and what’s involved. We’ll need to take a look at the workflow you need to build in and the volume of data to manage, discuss a few points including timeline and delivery etc. We can share screens and give you an idea of how it can look and operate in the platform while you walk us through the requirements.

Easy Mondays
teameasy@easy-mondays.com

posts.author: priyar (Priya Ragoowansi)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Sure! How soon can we arrange a call?

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @priyar ,

Happy to move as quickly as you need to - what time zone are you in?
Please send us through an email and we can connect with a zoom call today

Cheers,
Easy Mondays
teameasy@easy-mondays.com

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @priyar !

Welcome to the monday community and thank you for sharing your request with us !

I am an Implementation Consultant for thespelas.com. Here at thespelas.com we have a proven record of working using monday, having accumulated considerable expertise creating monday solutions, performing complex migrations and building and/or improving customized dashboards for over five years. We have a truly global footprint and have worked with many a company all around the world .

We strive to create products that immensely smooth over our clients’ workflow and provide the most informative high level views .We also have a great deal of experience with Travelling and Destination Marketing companies, having collaborated with numerous European and Middle Eastern firms from those Industries.

Please feel free to send an email at thanos@thespelas.com and @Athlos (Thanos) will quickly respond so you can book a Free Strategy Call. I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis
